creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
Created attachment 211104
svn-diff-abiword-3.0.4.

Update Abiword to 3.0.4.

AbiWord v3.0.4 Changelog

    release.sh: perform the release from ~/tmp and checksum and sign tarballs (Hubert Figuière)
    Update appdata for 3.0.4 (Hubert Figuière)
    Updated Russian translation (Olesya Gerasimenko)
    Bug 13917 - Fix a improper call to strncmp() (Hubert Figuière)
    Bug 13697 - fix a build failure in ut_jpeg.cpp (Hubert Figuiere)
    Added release date to appdata (Hubert Figuière)

(https://www.abisource.com/changelogs/3.0.4.phtml)
